ideation: This sequence simulates the action of pressing a stop button.  The animation will focus on a single arm extending and pressing down, then returning to rest.  The other arm remains stationary to maintain balance and focus on the action. The robot's lack of elbows will be addressed by using a combination of shoulder joint rotation and pitch to create the effect of a downward press. I will ensure that the movement is clear and unambiguous, communicating the 'stop' action effectively.  The animation will utilize a combination of joint1 (roll/rotation) and joint2 (pitch) to achieve the desired movement.  The wrist will be adjusted to maintain a natural orientation during the press.

frames.beat: both arms hang down, ready to act
the right arm extends forward and slightly up
the right arm presses down firmly to stop
both arms return to a resting position
